name: indiciumforge
description: Codex plugin packaging IndiciumForge onboarding, extension-authoring, and release-audit skills.

interface.shortDescription: Agent onboarding, extension authoring, and release audit for IndiciumForge.
interface.longDescription: IndiciumForge packages Codex skills for working safely with the contract-first open core for evidence-first financial research workflows. The plugin orients agents to the repository boundary, guides private extension authors without leaking proprietary logic, and supports release-readiness audits for packaging, PyPI, paper, and governance surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use $indiciumforge-orientation to get oriented in the repository.
Use $indiciumforge-extension-author to design a private extension pack.
Use $indiciumforge-release-audit to audit a release candidate.
